title: JeecgBoot
summary: 企业级 AI 低代码平台 v2.0，通过 AI Skills 自然语言生成整系统、流程图、表单与报表，内置 AI 应用平台含知识库和流程编排，面向 Java 企业开发场景。
summary_en: Enterprise AI low-code platform v2.0 with AI Skills that generate entire systems, workflows, forms, and reports via natural language, featuring a built-in AI application platform with knowledge base and workflow orchestration.
highlights: AI Skills 一句话生成前后端完整系统
内置 Dify 类 AI 应用平台与知识库
低代码+零代码双模驱动，Java 全栈
